productDisplayName: Jungle Book Boys Baby Red Clothing Set
description: Style NoteLet your little man enjoy comfort and style with this t-shirt and shorts set from the jungle book collection. This set is sure to become a favourite in no time and is a must buy. Team it with comfy footwear for that uber cool and comfy look.Product DetailsRed sleeveless t-shirt that has a round neck, graphic and rubber print on the front, stitch detailing, and brand badge above the left hemRed shorts with a broad elasticated waistband and drawstrings, graphic and rubber print on the right and white panels on the sidesMaterial and Care100% CottonHand wash warm with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededLine dryCool iron; do not iron on decorationsDo not dry clean
